untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental/valuation metrics (market capitalization, P/E ratio, price-to-book ratio, sector percentiles) which are NOT available in the allowed indicator list. The allowed indicators are exclusively technical (price action, moving averages, oscillators, volatility). This is a fundamental value-selection strategy that cannot be expressed using only technical indicators.
translation_notes: ARONSON_DRY_0_0 is a value/reversion strategy based on absolute and relative valuation metrics. Entry conditions require: (1) market cap in 10th percentile globally, (2) P/E ratio in 25th percentile of sector, (3) price-to-book in 25th percentile of sector. Exit conditions: valuation moves above 40th percentile OR 12-month hold. These conditions require access to: market cap values, earnings data, book value data, and sector-relative percentile rankings. None of these fundamental data points or cross-sectional comparative metrics are expressible using the provided technical indicator set.
